database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  FILTER (?person = 62)
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?abstract ?abstract_text
WHERE {
  ?abstract rdf:type conf:Abstract .
  ?abstract conf:is_the_1th_part_of ?paper .
  ?abstract conf:has_text ?abstract_text .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?conference_id
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference_id .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

WHERE p.ID = 62
RETURN p1.ID AS paper_id
LIMIT 10

            WHERE has_text IS NOT NULL AND is_the_1th_part_of IN (63)

SELECT "Paper"."ID", "Paper"."has_a_paper_title"
FROM "Paper"
WHERE "Paper"."ID" IN (63)

MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
RETURN p.ID AS paper_id, c.ID AS conference_id_id

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  FILTER (?person = 441)
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?abstract ?abstract_text
WHERE {
  ?abstract rdf:type conf:Abstract .
  ?abstract conf:is_the_1th_part_of ?paper .
  ?abstract conf:has_text ?abstract_text .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?title
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_a_paper_title ?title .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?conference_id
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference_id .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

WHERE p.ID = 441

FROM "Paper"
WHERE "Paper"."ID" IN (329)
